c74object.name: dk.concatcreate
c74object.digest: Creates a corpus for concatenation from an audio file or folder
c74object.description: The dk.concatcreate objecct analyzes a single sound file or folder for a variety of descriptors, timeframes, and metadata. Keeps track of the location of the samples when analyzed.
c74object.discussion:
If you want to learn more about the underlying algorithm have a look at this article:
https://learn.flucoma.org/reference/kdtree

inlet.description: Takes the messages for object control.

outlet.description: The analysis process completion expressed in percentage.
The total amount of time the analysis took.

method.name: print
method.digest: Print summary info to Max console
method.description: Prints summary info including overall statistics to the Max console.

method.name: read
method.digest: Read an audio file for analysis
method.description: Reads a single audio file for analysis directly from an absolute path. With no additional argument, a file dialog will appear to choose a file.

method.name: readfolder
method.digest: Read an audio folder for analysis
method.description: Reads an audio folder directly from a relative or absolute path. With no additional argument, a file dialog will appear to choose a folder.

method.name: write
method.description: Write a .json file with all the descriptors and required metadata to disk.
